OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

CONNECTOR_IPSUM_API_BASE_URL.description: The URL of the IPsum feed to fetch (levels 1-8 are available).

CONNECTOR_IPSUM_API_KEY.description: Optional GitHub API key used to avoid rate limiting.

CONNECTOR_IPSUM_DEFAULT_X_OPENCTI_SCORE.description: Default x_opencti_score to set on imported observables.

CONNECTOR_IPSUM_TLP_LEVEL.description: TLP marking to apply to imported data (white, clear, green, amber, amber+strict, red).
